name: Asymptotic safety as theory of everything
summary: Classification: TOE-ASPIRATIONAL (program-level, minimal composition). Quantum gravity is rendered non-perturbatively renormalisable by a non-trivial UV fixed point of the gravitational coupling (Weinberg 1979; Reuter 1998). If the fixed point also drags the SM matter sector, dimensionless SM couplings could be predicted from the UV (Wetterich 2018; Eichhorn-Held 2018), partially addressing the SM-free-parameters problem without invoking a string landscape. Frequently composed with Higgs inflation because the same gravitational running that gives the UV fixed point also affects the non-minimal Higgs-curvature coupling. Closes quantum-gravity-consistency by hypothesis; ameliorates SM-free-parameters; does not address dark matter, baryogenesis, or flavor structure within the program itself. Minimal mechanism set reflects that asymptotic safety is more a UV-completion claim than a full BSM toolbox.

lineage.citation: Weinberg, 'Ultraviolet divergences in quantum theories of gravitation', in 'General Relativity: An Einstein Centenary Survey' (Cambridge 1979)
Reuter, 'Nonperturbative evolution equation for quantum gravity', PRD 57, 971 (1998)
Lauscher and Reuter, 'Fractal spacetime structure in asymptotically safe gravity', JHEP 0510 (2005) 050
Eichhorn, 'An asymptotically safe guide to quantum gravity and matter', Front. Astron. Space Sci. 5, 47 (2019)
